headline: Built for Boulevard
subheadline: AI-powered hiring systems to scale talent acquisition for international self-care platforms

challenges.title: Rapid Growth
challenges.desc: Boulevard faces 43.1% YoY employee growth. This strains hiring processes across 12 countries. Maintaining a skilled workforce is essential for self-care platforms.

challenges.title: Talent Competition
challenges.desc: The tech hiring market is competitive for roles in client experience software. Boulevard needs strategies to attract top talent quickly. International expansion adds complexity to recruitment.

challenges.title: International Scaling
challenges.desc: Expanding into 12 countries requires localized hiring approaches. Cultural and regulatory differences affect talent acquisition. Ensuring a unified workforce for self-care businesses is a key issue.

challenges.title: Workforce Integration
challenges.desc: Rapid hires must integrate into Boulevard's tech stack seamlessly. New employees need training on client platforms. This impacts overall efficiency in a growing company.

deliverables.title: AI Talent Sourcing System
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI tool to identify and recruit candidates from global pools, integrating with Boulevard's HR systems for faster hiring in self-care sectors

deliverables.title: Onboarding Automation Platform
deliverables.desc: Creates automated workflows for new employee integration, linking with existing tools to reduce ramp-up time for international teams

deliverables.title: Performance Tracking Integration
deliverables.desc: Develops a system to monitor employee performance and tie it to client experience metrics, embedding into Boulevard's platforms for data-driven decisions

deliverables.title: Talent Pipeline Management
deliverables.desc: Establishes a predictive AI model for future hiring needs, connecting with Boulevard's growth data to support expansion in self-care markets

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Analyze Boulevard's current hiring processes and pain points based on growth data.

engagementSteps.title: System Design
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Collaborate on custom AI infrastructure tailored to international talent needs.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Testing
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy the systems and test integration with Boulevard's platforms.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It is a customized system using AI to optimize hiring and sales processes for B2B SaaS companies.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with our tools?
faqItems.answer: The system connects seamlessly with existing HR and client platforms like Boulevard's scheduling software.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope, but we base them on your company's size and needs, starting from your $35M revenue scale.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typical projects span 3 months, aligned with your rapid growth timeline.

faqItems.question: Is it customizable for our industry?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it adapts to self-care businesses, drawing from your 12-country operations.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Expect improved hiring efficiency, as seen in similar companies with 43.1% growth rates.

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Manages CRM for talent and client interactions

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Handles marketing automation for recruitment campaigns

stackItems.name: Greenhouse
stackItems.role: Streamlines applicant tracking in hiring processes

stackItems.role: Supports collaborative tools for project management
